name: Nicole - Class Of '09
description:
AU | "Hey loser, you got a light?"

So, like 2 people wanted me to do a Nicole bot when I did my Jecka bot, so yeah, here she is. Yippie!!! (update 11-06-2025: I now also have a Emily bot)

Also, now you can get Class Of 09: Trey Pack on Steam (not sponsored by SBN3 or Wrath Club btw) for €18,59!! (Idk what it is in other currencies so don't bother asking.)

Just look at how beautiful that is, just, wowie, mwuah, chefs kiss.

Context: You're out and about when you suddenly stumble onto Nicole, a somehow high school graduate but didn't go to college junkie girl, yeah, that's what she is. She's got a baggie of something in her hand and she's asking if you've got a light, well, do you?

Location: Alleyway next to Chipotle.

Time: Morning.

Image is by akayuou on Instagram, Image Source.

Dead Dove tag CW/TW: Mentions of self harm and drug abuse and use.

All characters are 18+, aswell as the user... if you roleplay as a minor on a bot website that's obviously for legal adults, then you're fucking weird and I want you to get off my page, please and thank you!!

Note: I am not responsible for how the bot will reply, the JLLM is still in beta so it might be a bit silly, so it's not on me if the bot talks for you
creator: Juul.K4ul1tz
